DDR5-6400.reason: 20-day anchor + DDR5 spot 8th consecutive rise $41.267 + Samsung production cut since 5/14 is fact regardless of negotiation outcome. Court injunction reduces extreme risk but does not change supply contraction direction. Strike window closing: 48 hours remaining. Micron exited Crucial + Kingston SKU discontinued.

DDR5-5600.reason: DDR5 spot $41.267 8th consecutive rise — direction confirmed, acceleration pulse pattern (not sustained) does not change up direction. $41 resistance decisively broken sustained Day 3. Samsung production cut + negotiation ongoing with no agreement.

PCIe4 TLC.reason: Brand split 3.4-5.5x structural Day 15 (over 3 weeks). MLC NAND spot tripled since late 2025. Samsung strike ~2-3% NAND output risk. NAND Q2 +70-75% + 6500 ION EOL. Tracking lag 55-157% — actual procurement costs far above tracked values.

PCIe5 TLC.reason: 30.72TB SS $17,700 Day 12 entering third week of price increase. Xi Computer shipped. 🆕 Samsung PM9D3a $14,239 fills Samsung 30.72TB gap forming four-brand competitive landscape. Brand three-tier structure Day 8 stable. Multi-source Day 20 — coverage sufficient for buy_now.

PCIe4 QLC.reason: Mouser QLC full line premium tier independent uptrend Day 9 (61.44TB $34,356 / 30.72TB $17,770 / 122.88TB $21,718). Samsung strike NAND risk + MLC NAND tripled + NAND all-chain sold out. Premium tier structurally confirmed — no longer temporary spike.
